sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105268" key="trisso/zwos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρισσό-ζωος</orth>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρισσό-ζοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with three lives,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τρισοιζυρός.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
